selected_pages.reason: Directly covers system datetime and business date switching mechanism (SystemTimeProvider, BusinessDateProvider), including sections on switching for unit tests.
Contains a dedicated section 'システム日時を任意の値に固定したい' with concrete FixedSystemTimeProvider XML config for test use.
Explains the mechanism for switching components between environments (production/test) via environment-specific XML config files.
Contains 'Java Beansオブジェクトの設定を上書きする' which explains the XML-based override mechanism used to swap production components with test mocks.

selected_sections.reason: Explains the core mechanism: swapping the class in component definition switches datetime, directly answering how the mechanism works.
Shows the concrete production component configuration (BasicSystemTimeProvider with name 'systemTimeProvider').
Directly answers how to switch system datetime for unit tests: implement SystemTimeProvider and replace the component definition.
Directly answers how to switch business date for unit tests: implement BusinessDateProvider and replace the component definition.
Explains how to override business date for a specific process using system properties.
Explains the problem (date-dependent test results) and the solution: FixedSystemTimeProvider as the standard test-only implementation.
Concrete XML configuration example showing how to set FixedSystemTimeProvider with fixedDate property.
Explains the XML component override mechanism: define a component with the same name to replace it — the underlying mechanism for test/production switching.
Explains the pattern for switching components by environment via config file switching.
Javadoc for BasicSystemTimeProvider referenced from libraries-date s5.
